impact: P1's main fix (C15=8.2n, C17=1.8n) brought 8k/10k within +/-1.5dB (was -3.4). Residual at 12.5k/16k (-5.9/-19.1dB) is cumulative bilinear warp of the V2 recovery LPF cascade, not a component value -- ruled out: C16 470p->330p (overshot +4.7dB at 8k), C14 47n->39n (regressed LF hump to 2.04dB), C32/C29 22p->15p (zero effect, confirms error is pre-tone-stack), C42 10n->12n (worse). Likely needs prewarp (utils/Prewarp.h exists, unused) or extending the oversampled region per dsp.md 'Top-octave accuracy'.
title: V2 12.5k/16k HF residual is cumulative bilinear warp
